methodology_notes: Sophos 2026 CISO Report + Active Adversary findings (Sophos IR/MDR incident data) and Cybersecurity Trust Reality (5,000 organizations across 17 countries). Grounds resource constraints and the identity-attack threat reality. Incident-share figures are from Sophos IR/MDR caseload, not a CISO opinion survey.

distributions.context: 67% of all incidents investigated by Sophos IR/MDR were rooted in identity-related attacks.
71% of enterprises experienced an identity-related breach.
Weak management of non-human identities (machine accounts, which can outnumber humans 100:1) was the root cause of 41% of successful identity breaches.
70–90% of breaches are linked to human factors (social engineering, phishing). Midpoint stored.
~4.8M unfilled cybersecurity roles globally; ~35,000 CISOs serve ~359M businesses (≈10,000:1). Hiring/retention is a top resilience barrier.
